Cushion Color Options

Top, bottom, or both · High-density foam · Upholstered for durability

Available cushion colors

White
Black
Charcoal
Grey
Red
Navy
Blue
Green

Cushions are available for the top shelf, bottom bench, or both. High-density foam is upholstered in your choice of color to match your locker room. Contact us for the full range or to match your team colors.
